S.FORM: == Suniuo, sofitay no Dipong 'Amis a tamdaw. == Suniuo (roma pangangan ci Attun Palalin, i 1919 miheca 10 folad 8 roma'ad-1979 miheca 6 folad 15 romi'ad), o ngangan to no Dipong ci Nakamura Teruo, o nano Torik no Posong a 'Amis tamdaw, Takasago borantiachimu no Dipong a Taywan tamdaw, i 1944 miheca kalaloodan no Taypinyang tayra i Morotai kanatal no Intonisiya mikapot malalood, sakas tosa miheca miteka tora kanatal i kilakilangan milimek to 30 mihecaan itiya, mala masidayay sofitay no Dipong, tangasa 1974 miheca manengneng itiya. Kasofocan Kaemangan 'orip Ci Suniuo masofoc i 1919 miheca 10 folad 8 romi'ad , ina ci Kalo, mama ci Rawa, o 'Amis a tamdaw , kasofocan i Torik no Singko a kowan , midotoc to sowal no kaka a fafahiyan to pipangangan ci Suniuoan ko "Macodahay" sanay , o kakitaan no niyaro ci Kacuo pakaci Suriyon han ningra . Sacisowal sa ko kaka ni Suniuo ci Kaliting nai to'asan itiniay to i Torik ko 'orip, o sasafaay ci Suniuo a malikaka, sasepat ko kaka to fa'inayan, tatosa ko kaka to fafahiyan . I 1927 miheca, mitilid ci Suniuo itini no Suingko a kowan Torik pitilidan itiya i, o ci'icelay misomo ato miseti' to mali (yakyu), malamicepetay to mali itiya, tayra i Taypi malalifet. O singsi ci Hayashi Ko michi (Lin Haotao) palata'ang to kafana' ningra a mitilid, maontoay, kahemekan no singsi mitiliday wawa. Mapakaolah pahofi no Posong sitinciw itiya . Misawad ci Suniuo i, tayra cingra i Sekiyama (Takofan) mala yopinya . Ira ko cecay romi'ad pi'adop ningra itiya, masaso'araw to fafahiyan no Sena' no Alapawan a tamdaw, o safa to cecay miheca ci Araayan (Li lanyin) . I 1940 miheca 6 folad 28 romi'ad, mikadafo ci Suniuo tayra ci Araayan . Itira i Sena' niyaro' no Alapawan ko aro' itiya . Matahidang malasofitay Saka tosa kalaloodan no hekal itiya, mitahidang ko sofitay no Dipong to Takasago borantiachimu a yincumin no Taywan, itira i Kocuang no Sincu minanam to toloay folad a kiwiko to saka tayra i Nanyo malalood . 1943 miheca 10 folad, micomod ci Suniuo, ci Kuo Cangmin ko kakeridan a tayra i Takofan mipangangan, ta tayra i Takao minato itiya . Mikapot ci Suniuo to saka sepat folad i, ci ngangan cingra to no Dipong, paka ci "Nakamura Teruo" han . I 1943 miheca 12 folad 11 romi'ad, ci sofoc to fa'inayan a wawa ci Li Hongan . I 1944 miheca 7 folad 12 romi'ad, Suniuo ko kacingangan to "o saka 2 milooday" a tadamanay sofitay i Morotai kanatal . Ci Suniuo aci Huang Kuanshou mapatodongay toya kakeridan ci Kawashima Takeshi saka 2 milooday , mamikoliniw to hikoki no Amilika sofitay . Sacisowal sa ci Huang Kuanshou talasekal koya sofitay no nikapolongan i, misitapang to cangra malalood, nika toya kalahokan mahikeda no kapolongan sofitay ko 'aolay fadahong no sofitay, nanoyaan sato malaliyas ci Suniuoan saan . I 1945 miheca 3 folad 5 romi'ad, itira ci Suniuo i Culay sa'etal malafel . Nano fafaloay ho cangra aci Wakamatsu Isao itiya, nika ira ko kalaliyaliyangan saka siiked sato ci Suniuo saan . O nano saka 1 sakapot ci Yi wenfa sowal sa, tona nika awaayto no kakaenen no Takasago yiyutai itiya, tayra cingra i riyar miladem to kaheciday nanom, manengneng ci Suniuo i tefotefosan, tahidang han mikapot to saka 1 sakapot, nika kana'ayen ningra saan . Katapi'an no Dipong i, I 1945 miheca 9 folad 7 romi'ad, malopisakay i Morotai kanatal a sofitay to kasa'opoan i, awaay masadak ci Suniuo pako mapatayay i kalaloodan sato ko nengneng . Dengan ci Suniuo ira ko 5 a Takasago yiyutai masidayay i Morotai kanatal . Pilimekan romi'ad Kafana'en a demak I 1974 miheca 11 folad 18 romi'ad, o hikoki no Indonesia misolap to Morotai kanatal itiya, masapinang ko lamal i kilakilangan, miketon latek o nilikatan no masidayay sofitay no Dipong . Itiya 28 romi'ad, ona pakalayap to ratoh kakeridan no karayanay sofitay Congwiy ci Subadi i, misakapot to mamikilim . I 12 folad 16 romi'ad 5 ko widi to kanikaran, micomod ko sakapot toya lotolotokan to 50 kingli . Pakayni 36 ko widi, i 18 romi'ad 'ayaw no lahok matama ko cecay no aol misanga'an loma', ipapotal ira ko pinaloma kalitang, tali, pawli, 'ayam, o cecay makakawangay a fa'inayan mitatoy to fonas mipela' to aol . O sakapot ni Subadi pakaikor ni Suniuo talipalaw han mitakec, mapacekok ci Suniuo miceli' a misa'oca'ocay . O saka eca pirarimok, pasadak han to koya fayfay no Dipong, romadiw to sofitay no Dipong . oya mifalicay to sowal no Dipong misaheci pasowal paherekay to ko lalood, pisanga'ay no sakapot, pasadak to tamako, satomenek sato ci Suniuo itiya . Ca Subadi sato micomod laloma' ira ko cecay a kowang ato 19 a timera . Makorac ko kowang ni Suniuo , oya riko' no sofitay matelang masaciped ito . Manengneng ni Suniuo ko nipataynian na Subadi a kakaenen maemin makaen, pasadak han to ningra koya nisimedan a malo kakaenen nangra . Ci Suniuo mapasadak to nai lotolotokan, itira saho i kahiceraan no sofitay i Morotai kanatal to 10 romi'ad . O nano makalah matalaway ho ci Suniuo, tangasa makerid ni Subadi tayra i loma' ningra, miliso' to cecayay ho miheca a wawa ningra to fafahiyan, sanga'ay sato ko faloco' ningra itiya . I 12 folad 26 romi'ad herek no lahok, "Cancin sinpon" paratohan ci Furuya Keiji pasitenokan pasowal, ira koya nano Taywan yincumin ci Nakamura Teruo, itiniay i Indonesia tarokos no Dipong o tatayra i Morotai kanatal miala patayra i Jakarta . Masadak konini a ratoh tayni i Posong i, o kakeridan no Posang ci Huang Jingfeng ano mangalay minokay ci Suniuo, o sasasongila'en ko paloma'an no 'orip ningra . I 27 romi'ad, o satakaraway papotalay todemak tatingwa to itiraay Jakarta kalali'acaan kayciw ci Jiang Yizeng, sarocoden konini a tamdaw panokay tayni Taywan . Oya itiraay i Indonesia a Conghua li'acaay yofayof mafana' to itiraay a Soar kosi matayalay Kalinko tamdaw mafana' to no 'Amis a sowal, milicay ci Xu Chengyao to sapipatado . Tona tahira konini ratoh i Fafokod i, tano pakatengil koya 57 mihecaan ci Li Lanying tonini a demak, pacekil ko faloco' ningra . I 28 romi'ad, oya kokkosimosiw no Fafokod pawacay oya ci Nakamura Teruo hananay ci Li Guanghui korira . Saka tosa romi'ad maratar, ci Huan gjinmu talifahalan sa milaliw, miliyas ci Li Lanyingan a maro' . Kahiceraan no kika a kitakit O paretatenga no Dipong a sifo ci Suniuoan talacowa o sofitay no Dipong ko kacingangan ningra, nuika o katatelek i San Francisco ato kacacofel no Dipong ato Conghua renmin kapolongan, o awaayay to ko ngangan no kitakit a tamdaw . O tarokos no Dipong ona panokayen tayra i niyaro' no niyah ci Suniuo, ano eca pateli han pilitengan i Tokyo . I 1974 miheca 12 folad 30 romi'ad herek no lahok 1 ko widi, i papeloan, tona paini ko paratohay ci Suniuoan mihamham ko kapot milood i Dipongay, milicay o tatayra nasa, pa'ayaw ci Su Cenyao pasowal to no 'Amis a sowal, saka pacaa'of sato ci Suniuo to sapi nokayaw tayni niyaro' . I 31 romi'ad, pasowal sa ko itiraay i Indonesia tarokos no Dipong ci Cisana mura, o kacacofelan papotal pali'ayaw to sowal to sapipanokayaw i niyaro' Taywan saan to . Pasowal sa ko sakikika no Conghua minko sifo, midotoc t ono Sincenyin 1945, 1946 miheca a nihapiwan tatelekan, lonok sa patiyol ko kacingangan ni Suniuo to ngangan no Conghua minko . I 1975 miheca 1 folad 1 romi'ad herek no lahok, nai ci Jiang Yi milayap ci Suniuo to ngangan no Conghua minko a Passport, todong pahapinang to kacingangan to Conghua minko . Kaciadada to kang a mapatay Maolah mitamako ci Suniuo to Sinleyin, salongan tosa romi'ad 1 tafo ko nitamakoan . O sowal no wawa to mama kaira no lafang a nipafelian a tamoko, roma tahira 6 tafo ko nitamakoan saan . I 1978 miheca 2 folad 24 romi'ad, ci adada to no fala' ci Suniuo, patihien no fafahi patayra i Tay-ta isingan paising . Ikor no cecay folad i, miliyaw haca i 8 folad 31 romi'ad a maro' i isingan . Kaitiraan i pipaising ira ko mirarakatay a Dipong miliso' . Kaciadada ni Suniuo i, o Kararemay pikaykian iing ci Ma Motoshi ira miliso' cingraan, mipalowad to padafoh ci Suniuoan, ira ko 889,198 payso no Dipong . Saka tosa miheca 6 folad 1 romi'ad, sacisowal sa ci Lihong to mama malesap to tayra i 'atay ko kang no adada, caayto ka nga'ay dademak . I 1979 miheca 6 folad 15 romi'ad 'ayaw no lahok 10 ko toki 88 fen, i nipatihi no fafahi ci Suniuoan, itira i Fafokod a loma' miliyas a mapatay . O kasasowasowal no malaisingay ano itiraay ho ci Suniuo i lotolotokan i, latek caay ka ciadada kakaya' hook 'orip ningra saan . O fafahi ci Li Lanying itiya to i 2003 miheca 2 folad 25 romi'ad ko 'orip, ira ko 86 ko mihecaan ko 'orip .

sato~umənək sato~u ʦi so~u~unio~u~uo~u itija . ʦa so~u~ub~b~vaɬ~ɮi sato~u miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ ɾaɾo~umaʡ ira ko~u ʦəʦaj a ko~uwaŋ ato~u ** a timəra . mako~uraʦ ko~u ko~uwaŋ ni so~u~unio~u~uo~u , o~uja riko~uʡ no~u so~ufitaj matəɾaŋ masaʦipəɬ~ɮ ito~u . manəŋnəŋ ni so~u~unio~u~uo~u ko~u nipatajnian na so~u~ub~b~vaɬ~ɮi a kakaənən maəmin makaən, pasaɬ~ɮak ħan to~u niŋra ko~uja nisiməɬ~ɮan a maɾo~u kakaənən naŋra . ʦi so~u~unio~u~uo~u mapasaɬ~ɮak to~u nai ɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan, itira saħo~u i kaħiʦəraan no~u so~ufitaj i mo~uro~utai kanataɾ to~u ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ . o~u nano~u makaɾaħ mataɾawaj ħo~u ʦi so~u~unio~u~uo~u, taŋasa makəriɬ~ɮ ni so~u~ub~b~vaɬ~ɮi tajra i ɾo~umaʡ niŋra, miɾiso~uʡ to~u ʦəʦajaj ħo~u miħəʦa a wawa niŋra to~u fafaħijan, saŋaʡaj sato~u ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ niŋra itija . i ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk, "ʦanʦin sinpo~un" parato~uħan ʦi fo~u~uro~u~uja kəiji pasitəno~ukan paso~uwaɾ, ira ko~uja nano~u tajwan jinʦo~u~umin ʦi nakamo~u~ura təro~u~uo~u, itiniaj i inɬ~ɮo~unəsia taro~uko~us no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ o~u tatajra i mo~uro~utai kanataɾ miaɾa patajra i *akarta . masaɬ~ɮak ko~unini a rato~uħ tajni i po~uso~uŋ i, o~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u po~usaŋ ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ *iŋfəŋ ano~u maŋaɾaj mino~ukaj ʦi so~u~unio~u~uo~u, o~u sasaso~uŋiɾaʡən ko~u paɾo~umaʡan no~u ʡo~urip niŋra . i ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u satakarawaj papo~utaɾaj to~uɬ~ɮəmak tatiŋwa to~u itiraaj *akarta kaɾaɾiʡaʦaan kajʦiw ʦi *iaŋ ji*əŋ, saro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮən ko~unini a tamɬ~ɮaw pano~ukaj tajni tajwan . o~uja itiraaj i inɬ~ɮo~unəsia a ʦo~uŋħo~u~ua ɾiʡaʦaaj jo~ufajo~uf mafanaʡ to~u itiraaj a so~uar ko~usi matajaɾaj kaɾinko~u tamɬ~ɮaw mafanaʡ to~u no~u ʡamis a so~uwaɾ, miɾiʦaj ʦi xo~u~u ʦħəŋjao~u to~u sapipataɬ~ɮo~u . to~una taħira ko~unini rato~uħ i fafo~uko~uɬ~ɮ i, tano~u pakatəŋiɾ ko~uja ** miħəʦaan ʦi ɾi ɾanjiŋ to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak, paʦəkiɾ ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ niŋra . i ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~uja ko~ukko~usimo~usiw no~u fafo~uko~uɬ~ɮ pawaʦaj o~uja ʦi nakamo~u~ura təro~u~uo~u ħananaj ʦi ɾi *o~u~uaŋħo~u~ui ko~urira . saka to~usa ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maratar, ʦi ħo~u~uan *jinmo~u~u taɾifaħaɾan sa miɾaɾiw, miɾijas ʦi ɾi ɾanjiŋan a maro~uʡ . kaħiʦəraan no~u kika a kitakit o~u parətatəŋa no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a sifo~u ʦi so~u~unio~u~uo~uan taɾaʦo~uwa o~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u kaʦiŋaŋan niŋra, no~u~uika o~u katatəɾək i san franʦisʦo~u ato~u kaʦaʦo~ufəɾ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ato~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~ua rənmin kapo~uɾo~uŋan, o~u awaajaj to~u ko~u ŋaŋan no~u kitakit a tamɬ~ɮaw . o~u taro~uko~us no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ o~una pano~ukajən tajra i nijaro~uʡ no~u nijaħ ʦi so~u~unio~u~uo~u, ano~u əʦa patəɾi ħan piɾitəŋan i to~ukjo~u . i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk * ko~u wiɬ~ɮi, i papəɾo~uan, to~una paini ko~u parato~uħaj ʦi so~u~unio~u~uo~uan miħamħam ko~u kapo~ut miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋaj, miɾiʦaj o~u tatajra nasa, paʡajaw ʦi so~u~u ʦənjao~u paso~uwaɾ to~u no~u ʡamis a so~uwaɾ, saka paʦaaʡo~uf sato~u ʦi so~u~unio~u~uo~u to~u sapi no~ukajaw tajni nijaro~uʡ . i ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, paso~uwaɾ sa ko~u itiraaj i inɬ~ɮo~unəsia taro~uko~us no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ʦi ʦisana mo~u~ura, o~u kaʦaʦo~ufəɾan papo~utaɾ paɾiʡajaw to~u so~uwaɾ to~u sapipano~ukajaw i nijaro~uʡ tajwan saan to~u . paso~uwaɾ sa ko~u sakikika no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~ua minko~u sifo~u, miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ t o~uno~u sinʦənjin ****, **** miħəʦa a niħapiwan tatəɾəkan, ɾo~uno~uk sa patijo~uɾ ko~u kaʦiŋaŋan ni so~u~unio~u~uo~u to~u ŋaŋan no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~ua minko~u . i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk, nai ʦi *iaŋ ji miɾajap ʦi so~u~unio~u~uo~u to~u ŋaŋan no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~ua minko~u a passpo~urt, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ paħapinaŋ to~u kaʦiŋaŋan to~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~ua minko~u . kaʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa to~u kaŋ a mapataj mao~uɾaħ mitamako~u ʦi so~u~unio~u~uo~u to~u sinɾəjin, saɾo~uŋan to~usa ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ * tafo~u ko~u nitamako~uan . o~u so~uwaɾ no~u wawa to~u mama kaira no~u ɾafaŋ a nipafəɾian a tamo~uko~u, ro~uma taħira * tafo~u ko~u nitamako~uan saan . i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦi aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa to~u no~u faɾaʡ ʦi so~u~unio~u~uo~u, patiħiən no~u fafaħi patajra i taj-ta isiŋan paisiŋ . iko~ur no~u ʦəʦaj fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ i, miɾijaw ħaʦa i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a maro~uʡ i isiŋan . kaitiraan i pipaisiŋ ira ko~u mirarakataj a ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miɾiso~uʡ . kaʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ni so~u~unio~u~uo~u i, o~u kararəmaj pikajkian iiŋ ʦi ma mo~uto~usħi ira miɾiso~uʡ ʦiŋraan, mipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u paɬ~ɮafo~uħ ʦi so~u~unio~u~uo~uan, ira ko~u ***,*** pajso~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ . saka to~usa miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, saʦiso~uwaɾ sa ʦi ɾiħo~uŋ to~u mama maɾəsap to~u tajra i ʡataj ko~u kaŋ no~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa, ʦaajto~u ka ŋaʡaj ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak . i **** miħəʦa * ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ko~u ʡo~urip, ira ko~u ** ko~u miħəʦaan ko~u ʡo~urip .
S.FORM: == Suniuo, sofitay no Dipong 'Amis a tamdaw. == Suniuo (roma pangangan ci Attun Palalin, i 1919 miheca 10 folad 8 roma'ad-1979 miheca 6 folad 15 romi'ad), o ngangan to no Dipong ci Nakamura Teruo, o nano Torik no Posong a 'Amis tamdaw, Takasago borantiachimu no Dipong a Taywan tamdaw, i 1944 miheca kalaloodan no Taypinyang tayra i Morotai kanatal no Intonisiya mikapot malalood, sakas tosa miheca miteka tora kanatal i kilakilangan milimek to 30 mihecaan itiya, mala masidayay sofitay no Dipong, tangasa 1974 miheca manengneng itiya. Kasofocan Kaemangan 'orip Ci Suniuo masofoc i 1919 miheca 10 folad 8 romi'ad , ina ci Kalo, mama ci Rawa, o 'Amis a tamdaw , kasofocan i Torik no Singko a kowan , midotoc to sowal no kaka a fafahiyan to pipangangan ci Suniuoan ko "Macodahay" sanay , o kakitaan no niyaro ci Kacuo pakaci Suriyon han ningra . Sacisowal sa ko kaka ni Suniuo ci Kaliting nai to'asan itiniay to i Torik ko 'orip, o sasafaay ci Suniuo a malikaka, sasepat ko kaka to fa'inayan, tatosa ko kaka to fafahiyan . I 1927 miheca, mitilid ci Suniuo itini no Suingko a kowan Torik pitilidan itiya i, o ci'icelay misomo ato miseti' to mali (yakyu), malamicepetay to mali itiya, tayra i Taypi malalifet. O singsi ci Hayashi Ko michi (Lin Haotao) palata'ang to kafana' ningra a mitilid, maontoay, kahemekan no singsi mitiliday wawa. Mapakaolah pahofi no Posong sitinciw itiya . Misawad ci Suniuo i, tayra cingra i Sekiyama (Takofan) mala yopinya . Ira ko cecay romi'ad pi'adop ningra itiya, masaso'araw to fafahiyan no Sena' no Alapawan a tamdaw, o safa to cecay miheca ci Araayan (Li lanyin) . I 1940 miheca 6 folad 28 romi'ad, mikadafo ci Suniuo tayra ci Araayan . Itira i Sena' niyaro' no Alapawan ko aro' itiya . Matahidang malasofitay Saka tosa kalaloodan no hekal itiya, mitahidang ko sofitay no Dipong to Takasago borantiachimu a yincumin no Taywan, itira i Kocuang no Sincu minanam to toloay folad a kiwiko to saka tayra i Nanyo malalood . 1943 miheca 10 folad, micomod ci Suniuo, ci Kuo Cangmin ko kakeridan a tayra i Takofan mipangangan, ta tayra i Takao minato itiya . Mikapot ci Suniuo to saka sepat folad i, ci ngangan cingra to no Dipong, paka ci "Nakamura Teruo" han . I 1943 miheca 12 folad 11 romi'ad, ci sofoc to fa'inayan a wawa ci Li Hongan . I 1944 miheca 7 folad 12 romi'ad, Suniuo ko kacingangan to "o saka 2 milooday" a tadamanay sofitay i Morotai kanatal . Ci Suniuo aci Huang Kuanshou mapatodongay toya kakeridan ci Kawashima Takeshi saka 2 milooday , mamikoliniw to hikoki no Amilika sofitay . Sacisowal sa ci Huang Kuanshou talasekal koya sofitay no nikapolongan i, misitapang to cangra malalood, nika toya kalahokan mahikeda no kapolongan sofitay ko 'aolay fadahong no sofitay, nanoyaan sato malaliyas ci Suniuoan saan . I 1945 miheca 3 folad 5 romi'ad, itira ci Suniuo i Culay sa'etal malafel . Nano fafaloay ho cangra aci Wakamatsu Isao itiya, nika ira ko kalaliyaliyangan saka siiked sato ci Suniuo saan . O nano saka 1 sakapot ci Yi wenfa sowal sa, tona nika awaayto no kakaenen no Takasago yiyutai itiya, tayra cingra i riyar miladem to kaheciday nanom, manengneng ci Suniuo i tefotefosan, tahidang han mikapot to saka 1 sakapot, nika kana'ayen ningra saan . Katapi'an no Dipong i, I 1945 miheca 9 folad 7 romi'ad, malopisakay i Morotai kanatal a sofitay to kasa'opoan i, awaay masadak ci Suniuo pako mapatayay i kalaloodan sato ko nengneng . Dengan ci Suniuo ira ko 5 a Takasago yiyutai masidayay i Morotai kanatal . Pilimekan romi'ad Kafana'en a demak I 1974 miheca 11 folad 18 romi'ad, o hikoki no Indonesia misolap to Morotai kanatal itiya, masapinang ko lamal i kilakilangan, miketon latek o nilikatan no masidayay sofitay no Dipong . Itiya 28 romi'ad, ona pakalayap to ratoh kakeridan no karayanay sofitay Congwiy ci Subadi i, misakapot to mamikilim . I 12 folad 16 romi'ad 5 ko widi to kanikaran, micomod ko sakapot toya lotolotokan to 50 kingli . Pakayni 36 ko widi, i 18 romi'ad 'ayaw no lahok matama ko cecay no aol misanga'an loma', ipapotal ira ko pinaloma kalitang, tali, pawli, 'ayam, o cecay makakawangay a fa'inayan mitatoy to fonas mipela' to aol . O sakapot ni Subadi pakaikor ni Suniuo talipalaw han mitakec, mapacekok ci Suniuo miceli' a misa'oca'ocay . O saka eca pirarimok, pasadak han to koya fayfay no Dipong, romadiw to sofitay no Dipong . oya mifalicay to sowal no Dipong misaheci pasowal paherekay to ko lalood, pisanga'ay no sakapot, pasadak to tamako, satomenek sato ci Suniuo itiya . Ca Subadi sato micomod laloma' ira ko cecay a kowang ato 19 a timera . Makorac ko kowang ni Suniuo , oya riko' no sofitay matelang masaciped ito . Manengneng ni Suniuo ko nipataynian na Subadi a kakaenen maemin makaen, pasadak han to ningra koya nisimedan a malo kakaenen nangra . Ci Suniuo mapasadak to nai lotolotokan, itira saho i kahiceraan no sofitay i Morotai kanatal to 10 romi'ad . O nano makalah matalaway ho ci Suniuo, tangasa makerid ni Subadi tayra i loma' ningra, miliso' to cecayay ho miheca a wawa ningra to fafahiyan, sanga'ay sato ko faloco' ningra itiya . I 12 folad 26 romi'ad herek no lahok, "Cancin sinpon" paratohan ci Furuya Keiji pasitenokan pasowal, ira koya nano Taywan yincumin ci Nakamura Teruo, itiniay i Indonesia tarokos no Dipong o tatayra i Morotai kanatal miala patayra i Jakarta . Masadak konini a ratoh tayni i Posong i, o kakeridan no Posang ci Huang Jingfeng ano mangalay minokay ci Suniuo, o sasasongila'en ko paloma'an no 'orip ningra . I 27 romi'ad, o satakaraway papotalay todemak tatingwa to itiraay Jakarta kalali'acaan kayciw ci Jiang Yizeng, sarocoden konini a tamdaw panokay tayni Taywan . Oya itiraay i Indonesia a Conghua li'acaay yofayof mafana' to itiraay a Soar kosi matayalay Kalinko tamdaw mafana' to no 'Amis a sowal, milicay ci Xu Chengyao to sapipatado . Tona tahira konini ratoh i Fafokod i, tano pakatengil koya 57 mihecaan ci Li Lanying tonini a demak, pacekil ko faloco' ningra . I 28 romi'ad, oya kokkosimosiw no Fafokod pawacay oya ci Nakamura Teruo hananay ci Li Guanghui korira . Saka tosa romi'ad maratar, ci Huan gjinmu talifahalan sa milaliw, miliyas ci Li Lanyingan a maro' . Kahiceraan no kika a kitakit O paretatenga no Dipong a sifo ci Suniuoan talacowa o sofitay no Dipong ko kacingangan ningra, nuika o katatelek i San Francisco ato kacacofel no Dipong ato Conghua renmin kapolongan, o awaayay to ko ngangan no kitakit a tamdaw . O tarokos no Dipong ona panokayen tayra i niyaro' no niyah ci Suniuo, ano eca pateli han pilitengan i Tokyo . I 1974 miheca 12 folad 30 romi'ad herek no lahok 1 ko widi, i papeloan, tona paini ko paratohay ci Suniuoan mihamham ko kapot milood i Dipongay, milicay o tatayra nasa, pa'ayaw ci Su Cenyao pasowal to no 'Amis a sowal, saka pacaa'of sato ci Suniuo to sapi nokayaw tayni niyaro' . I 31 romi'ad, pasowal sa ko itiraay i Indonesia tarokos no Dipong ci Cisana mura, o kacacofelan papotal pali'ayaw to sowal to sapipanokayaw i niyaro' Taywan saan to . Pasowal sa ko sakikika no Conghua minko sifo, midotoc t ono Sincenyin 1945, 1946 miheca a nihapiwan tatelekan, lonok sa patiyol ko kacingangan ni Suniuo to ngangan no Conghua minko . I 1975 miheca 1 folad 1 romi'ad herek no lahok, nai ci Jiang Yi milayap ci Suniuo to ngangan no Conghua minko a Passport, todong pahapinang to kacingangan to Conghua minko . Kaciadada to kang a mapatay Maolah mitamako ci Suniuo to Sinleyin, salongan tosa romi'ad 1 tafo ko nitamakoan . O sowal no wawa to mama kaira no lafang a nipafelian a tamoko, roma tahira 6 tafo ko nitamakoan saan . I 1978 miheca 2 folad 24 romi'ad, ci adada to no fala' ci Suniuo, patihien no fafahi patayra i Tay-ta isingan paising . Ikor no cecay folad i, miliyaw haca i 8 folad 31 romi'ad a maro' i isingan . Kaitiraan i pipaising ira ko mirarakatay a Dipong miliso' . Kaciadada ni Suniuo i, o Kararemay pikaykian iing ci Ma Motoshi ira miliso' cingraan, mipalowad to padafoh ci Suniuoan, ira ko 889,198 payso no Dipong . Saka tosa miheca 6 folad 1 romi'ad, sacisowal sa ci Lihong to mama malesap to tayra i 'atay ko kang no adada, caayto ka nga'ay dademak . I 1979 miheca 6 folad 15 romi'ad 'ayaw no lahok 10 ko toki 88 fen, i nipatihi no fafahi ci Suniuoan, itira i Fafokod a loma' miliyas a mapatay . O kasasowasowal no malaisingay ano itiraay ho ci Suniuo i lotolotokan i, latek caay ka ciadada kakaya' hook 'orip ningra saan . O fafahi ci Li Lanying itiya to i 2003 miheca 2 folad 25 romi'ad ko 'orip, ira ko 86 ko mihecaan ko 'orip .

ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ), o~u ŋaŋan to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ʦi nakamo~u~ura təro~u~uo~u, o~u nano~u to~urik no~u po~uso~uŋ a ʡamis tamɬ~ɮaw, takasa*o~u b~b~vo~urantiaʦħimo~u~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw, i **** miħəʦa kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan no~u tajpinjaŋ tajra i mo~uro~utai kanataɾ no~u into~unisija mikapo~ut maɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, sakas to~usa miħəʦa mitəka to~ura kanataɾ i kiɾakiɾaŋan miɾimək to~u ** miħəʦaan itija, maɾa masiɬ~ɮajaj so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, taŋasa **** miħəʦa manəŋnəŋ itija. kaso~ufo~uʦan kaəmaŋan ʡo~urip ʦi so~u~unio~u~uo~u maso~ufo~uʦ i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ , ina ʦi kaɾo~u, mama ʦi rawa, o~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw , kaso~ufo~uʦan i to~urik no~u siŋko~u a ko~uwan , miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u kaka a fafaħijan to~u pipaŋaŋan ʦi so~u~unio~u~uo~uan ko~u "maʦo~uɬ~ɮaħaj" sanaj , o~u kakitaan no~u nijaro~u ʦi kaʦo~u~uo~u pakaʦi so~u~urijo~un ħan niŋra . saʦiso~uwaɾ sa ko~u kaka ni so~u~unio~u~uo~u ʦi kaɾitiŋ nai to~uʡasan itiniaj to~u i to~urik ko~u ʡo~urip, o~u sasafaaj ʦi so~u~unio~u~uo~u a maɾikaka, sasəpat ko~u kaka to~u faʡinajan, tato~usa ko~u kaka to~u fafaħijan . i **** miħəʦa, mitiɾiɬ~ɮ ʦi so~u~unio~u~uo~u itini no~u so~u~uiŋko~u a ko~uwan to~urik pitiɾiɬ~ɮan
